server/tests/test_compare_extended.py :: test_identical_images_have_perfect_edge_similarity
def test_identical_images_have_perfect_edge_similarity():
    raster = checkerboard(20, 16, cell=4)
    payload = png_bytes(raster)
    metrics = compare_images(payload, "a.png", payload, "b.png")
    assert metrics["identical_pixels"] is True
    assert metrics["edge_similarity"]["mae"] == 0.0
    assert metrics["edge_similarity"]["correlation"] == 1.0
    assert metrics["pixel_agreement_percent"] == 100.0

server/tests/test_compare_extended.py :: test_lossy_reencode_reports_quality_metrics
def test_lossy_reencode_reports_quality_metrics():
    raster = horizontal_gradient(32, 24)
    original = png_bytes(raster)
    reencoded = jpeg_bytes(raster, quality=92)
    metrics = compare_images(original, "src.png", reencoded, "out.jpg")
    assert metrics["ssim"] > 0.85
    assert metrics["edge_similarity"]["mae"] >= 0.0
    assert metrics["quality"] in {"excellent", "good", "fair", "poor"}

server/tests/test_compare_extended.py :: test_different_images_score_lower_agreement
def test_different_images_score_lower_agreement():
    left = png_bytes(solid(16, 16, 220, 20, 20))
    right = png_bytes(solid(16, 16, 20, 220, 20))
    metrics = compare_rasters(decode_image(left, "l.png"), decode_image(right, "r.png"))
    assert metrics["pixel_agreement_percent"] < 10.0
    assert metrics["quality"] == "poor"

server/tests/test_compare_extended.py :: test_tiff_png_compare_includes_byte_sizes
def test_tiff_png_compare_includes_byte_sizes():
    raster = solid(12, 12, 80, 120, 200)
    left = tiff_bytes(raster)
    right = png_bytes(raster)
    metrics = compare_images(left, "a.tiff", right, "b.png")
    assert metrics["byte_sizes"]["left"] == len(left)
    assert metrics["byte_sizes"]["right"] == len(right)
    assert metrics["mse"] == 0.0
